---
name: Errata
about: Report a factual error, broken reference, superseded regulatory timeline, or incorrect technical specification
title: "[ERRATA] <Short description of error>"
labels: errata, factual-correction
assignees: ''
---

## Error Report

**Framework Version(s) Affected:**  
<!-- e.g., v3.0; or "All versions" -->

**Section(s) Affected:**  
<!-- e.g., Section 16.1 — Regulatory Disclosure Timeline Map -->

**Type of Error:**  
<!-- Choose one: Factual Error | Superseded Regulation | Broken/Changed URL | Incorrect Technical Specification | Typographical Error | Other -->

---

## Description of Error

**Current Text (quote the relevant passage):**
> 

**What Is Incorrect:**  
<!-- Explain specifically what is wrong. -->

**Correct Information:**  
<!-- Provide the accurate information and the source that confirms it. -->

---

## Supporting Reference

<!-- Provide the authoritative source confirming the correct information.
     Use Chicago Manual of Style (17th edition) format. -->

Source:

URL (if applicable):

---

## Suggested Correction

<!-- If you can, provide the corrected text as it should appear in the framework. -->

```markdown
[Corrected text here]
```

---

## Urgency

**Is there operational or regulatory urgency?** Yes / No  
<!-- If yes, explain — e.g., a regulatory deadline that makes the error actively misleading -->

---

## Checklist

- [ ] I have verified the error against an authoritative primary source
- [ ] I have provided the correct information and its source
- [ ] This is a factual correction, not a proposed policy change (policy changes should use the Framework Amendment template)
